name: Additive D2 blockade
actions: Use caution when combining drugs with dopamine D2 receptor blockade.
Monitor for intolerance related to dopamine blockade, including restlessness, stiffness, tremor, and other extrapyramidal symptoms (educational).

rationale: Both drugs contribute dopamine D2 receptor blockade.
Combined D2 blockade may increase adverse effects related to dopamine antagonism.

explanation_template: {A_name} and {B_name} both contribute dopamine D2 receptor blockade. Combined use may increase adverse effects related to dopamine antagonism, including extrapyramidal symptoms (educational).

references.citation: PD stacking: additive dopamine D2 receptor blockade may increase adverse-effect burden.
